overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through Night City's downtown district at dusk. The scene features futuristic neon-lit skyscrapers with Japanese corporate signage, transitioning from a busy intersection to a pedestrian overlook and finally ascending into a narrow alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with crosswalk and construction barriers

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection
turning right to cross the street toward the Saburo tower

agents.ego_description: navigating a futuristic downtown intersection, waiting for traffic before crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: yellow and black striped barriers blocking off a construction area on the sidewalk
tall vertical neon sign with green Japanese characters and 'SABURO' text
large digital screens displaying colorful advertisements on building facades
yellow zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban intersection in Night City, with the camera positioned near construction barriers. The player waits for a black SUV to pass before turning right to cross the yellow-striped crosswalk, with the massive Saburo tower sign visible ahead against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian promenade with benches and neon storefronts

events.description: turning onto pedestrian walkway away from the main road traffic
entering area with prominent purple neon lighting from a storefront

agents.ego_description: walking along a pedestrian path lined with green benches and neon signs, passing litter and urban debris

entered.detail: red street sign reading 'Goldsmith' mounted on a black pole
green and yellow benches lining the walkway, some with occupants
large vertical digital billboard displaying Arasaka corporation advertisement with a soldier image
storefront with bright purple neon lighting and circular signage

segments.scene_description: The player turns onto a pedestrian promenade marked by a 'Goldsmith' street sign, leaving the main intersection behind. The walkway features green benches and scattered trash, with a large Arasaka billboard visible ahead. Purple neon lights from a storefront illuminate the right side as the player continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian overlook with highway view

events.description: slowing down as approaching two NPCs standing at the overlook railing
NPC woman with cybernetic arm turns to face camera and takes a drink from a cup

agents.ego_description: approaching an overlook area where two NPCs are conversing by a railing overlooking the highway below

notable_agents.action: woman with cybernetic arm drinking from a cup and conversing with companion
man in gray tank top leaning against railing overlooking traffic

entered.detail: concrete barrier railing overlooking the multi-lane highway below
futuristic vehicles moving along the highway visible from the overlook

segments.scene_description: The player approaches an elevated overlook with a concrete railing overlooking busy highway traffic below. Two NPCs stand conversing—a man in a tank top and a woman with a visible cybernetic arm who turns to take a drink. The Arasaka billboard remains visible in the background as the scene focuses on the character interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley and stairway between buildings

events.description: beginning to ascend wide concrete stairs between tall building walls
emerging from stairwell into narrow alley with construction barriers and new signage

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs between buildings and emerging into a narrow alleyway with construction debris and new storefronts

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase ascending between close building walls
tight corridor formed by adjacent building walls with minimal lighting
red neon sign for 'BARRY'S' with 'IT'S BIG' text and arrow
white and orange construction barriers blocking the alley ahead with debris scattered around

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the overlook and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase between tall building walls, transitioning into a narrow, dimly lit alleyway. At the top, the scene opens to reveal a 'BARRY'S' neon sign and construction barriers blocking the path ahead, with red-brick buildings visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bustling urban intersection into a more secluded pedestrian promenade under a darkening dusk sky. It begins near construction barriers at a futuristic crossing, where the camera pauses for a black SUV before turning right across a yellow-striped crosswalk toward the towering Saburo sign. As the player leaves the main intersection behind, the scene shifts onto a walkway marked by a Goldsmith street sign, moving past green benches and scattered debris. The environment then transitions from the open road to a narrower path, guided by a large Arasaka billboard and the glow of purple neon lights emanating from a storefront on the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling urban overlook into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit alleyway. It begins at an elevated concrete railing overlooking heavy highway traffic, where the camera lingers on a man in a tank top and a woman with a cybernetic arm conversing beneath a distant Arasaka billboard. As the player moves away from the overlook, the perspective shifts toward a wide concrete staircase flanked by towering building walls. The scene then narrows as the camera ascends the stairs and enters a dimly lit alley, where the open city view is replaced by the glow of a Barry's neon sign. Finally, the path terminates at construction barriers set against a backdrop of distant red-brick buildings.
